nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Congratulations — you've been named the league's Most Valuable Player. An incredible season.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Thank you. This belongs to my teammates and coaches as much as it does to me. I couldn't have done it without them.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: It feels amazing! All the hard work paid off. I'm going to enjoy this one.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The Cy Young Award goes to... congratulations on an outstanding pitching season.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I need to thank my catcher first. He called an incredible game all year. This is shared.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I worked harder than ever this offseason. The results speak for themselves.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Rookie of the Year — what a debut season. How does it feel?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: It's surreal. A year ago I was in the minors hoping for a shot. The veterans in that clubhouse made this possible.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: This is just the beginning. I've got a lot more to prove. MVP is the next goal.
